sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Athletic Club are in strong form, winning their last 3 matches with clean sheets, showing defensive solidity. Barcelona, however, have had mixed results with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss in their last 5 matches, but their attack remains potent with consistent high-scoring games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head encounters, Barcelona have dominated Athletic Club, winning both matches (2-0 away and 2-1 at home). This suggests Barcelona have a tactical edge over Athletic Club in recent meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Athletic Club boast the best defensive record in the league, conceding only 26 goals, while Barcelona lead the league in goals scored (99). Barcelona's superior attacking stats and higher league position (1st vs 4th) indicate they are likely to control possession and create more chances.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Barcelona's attacking trio of Lewandowski, Raphinha, and Lamine Yamal are in form, with high expected goals and assists. Athletic Club will rely on Oihan Sancet and Iñaki Williams for creativity, but they face a challenge against Barcelona's dynamic frontline despite missing key defender Koundé.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Athletic Club's strong home defense at San Mamés may keep the game tight initially, but Barcelona's superior firepower and ability to score late (high % of goals after 76th minute) could decide the outcome. Expect a competitive match with cards likely due to historical trends (4.5+ cards in 4/5 head-to-heads).
